title: centaurium tenuiflorum subsp. acutiflorum
intro: Centaurium tenuiflorum subsp. acutiflorum, also known as mountain centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Centaurium tenuiflorum subsp. acutiflorum include its potential to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. Centaurium tenuiflorum subsp. acutiflorum is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its herbal remedies, and can also be found in some herbal supplements.
